title: @andreysuperior: Do you actually understand what's happening right now. Everyone is talking about AI agents. Nobody is talking about sell
summary: @andreysuperior: Do you actually understand what's happening right now. Everyone is talking about AI agents. Nobody is talking about sell
whyItMatters: Do you actually understand what's happening right now. Everyone is talking about AI agents. Nobody is talking about selling them as a business. And this guy just literally built himself a system on a mini PC that makes $20,000/month doing exactly that. Small businesses are paying $20,000-$30,000/month for ops teams doing repetitive work.
